title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 17: The Three Divisions of Faith
description: Chapter 17 of the Bhagavad Gita: Faith, food, sacrifice, austerity, and charity each come in three kinds — sattvic, rajasic, and tamasic.
introduction: Chapter 17 of the Bhagavad Gita: Faith, food, sacrifice, austerity, and charity each come in three kinds — sattvic, rajasic, and tamasic.

translation.text: The faith of each person is in accordance with their nature. A person is made of faith: as their faith is, so are they.
